issues.sample: Phoenix, AZ. Temperature was 118*F.  Sunroof exploded while driving down highway.  Vehicle had been parked for 2 hours. I started the vehicle and turned on the air conditioning. 5 minutes later the sunroof exploded.

narrative.headline: What 2022 Mini Countryman owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Unknown Or Other (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Phoenix, AZ. Temperature was 118*F.  Sunroof exploded while driving down highway.  Vehicle had been parked for 2 hours. I started the vehicle and turned on the air conditioning. 5 minutes later the sunroof exploded.
issues.title: Unknown Or Other
